edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: hopefully I can net my first win

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: you must be doing pretty well?

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: i think it's between me and kieran for the extravagant prize,

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: not sure exactly how it works though

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: we'll all have had a win

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: that would be a nice ending

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: a few weeks ago she said she was away travelling somewhere, and that we could play without

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: think i'll play it throughout the game

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: I'm a bit weird when it comes to music.

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: most of my favourite artists are from the 80's/90's

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: heh that's not too weird really,

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: music's taken a bad turn recently

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: i'm sort of a classical musician,

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: but i respect popular music from the time in which it was actually

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: nice, no shame in that all

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: what classical composers do you like?

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: we played an arrangement of this in my brass band this year

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: i mostly like late romantic /20th century composers,

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: Most German/Austrian composers from the 18th/19th centuries.

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: I particularly like Wagner and Bach.

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: Rachmaninov also has some beautiful piano works

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: I don't know if you know John Field.

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: so I'm quite proud of him too.

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: ah, no i haven't heard of him

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: any response from him at all?

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: i'll send an e-mail just on the off-chance he's online but forgotten

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: he definitely said he could play before

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: if we can't do it tonight,

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: our last hope really is that we can play it on wednesday

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: But if you want to do so,

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: As I said, I don't mind at this stage

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: well it would be a shame to exclude you,

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: since you showed up today and all

edus.speaker: Gaeilgeoir
edus.text: ah god, I'd be online anyway, trust me.

edus.speaker: inca
edus.text: to be honest i think the fairest thing would be for us to play it now without him

edus.text: I have six windows open at once here
